Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16
Off Calendar May-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin Sullivan, Esq. 415-434-1184 for Plaintiff Roark O'Neil.
James Holder, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP 415-986-5900 for Defendant MARTIN GLICKFELD.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff requests a stay on the order, argues total time and not hourly rate, Defendant responds.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MARTIN GLICKFELD's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16.

Taken under Submission.*(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)Defendant submits a proposed order to the Court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano , CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

*After the hearing, the Court signs an Order granting Defendant Martin Glickfield's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16. (see scanned order for details)*

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To May-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Continued To Apr-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MARTIN GLICKFELD's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 is CONTINUED to April 13, 2018 at 9:30 am so that Judge Richard Ulmer, who made the decision on the anti-SLAPP motion, will decide this motion.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James K. Holder, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP, T:415.986.5900, for defendant/moving party;
Kevin Sullivan, Esq. and Daniel White, Esq. of the Law Offices of Kevin Sullivan, T:415.434.1184, for plaintiff/opposing party;
Matthew Wertheim, Esq. of the Law Offices of Matthew Wertheim, T:415.775.8950, for the Peterson defendants.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court takes DEFENDANT MARTIN GLICKFELD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT under submission. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

[After hearing, DEFENDANT MARTIN GLICKFELD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED by the Court. ORDER signed. See signed order for complete ruling.]
